Our Game: Still

A real game my friends and I designed and built in a 3-day game jam!

⭐ Life Cycle of a Star
Every star has a life story. Tap Next to follow along!
✨ Constellations
A constellation is a group of stars that makes a picture in the night sky. Long ago, people connected the stars and imagined animals and heroes! Pick one below, then tap its stars in order to draw it.
⭐ Star Quiz
✨ Make a Constellation
Tap the dark sky to add stars — they connect as you go!
✨ 12 Zodiac Signs
The zodiac is a ring of 12 special constellations that the Sun seems to travel through during the year. Each one is a "star sign" with its own personality! Tap a sign to see its stars.
✨
Tap a sign above to learn about it!
🌈 Star Colors
Stars come in different colors — and the color tells us how HOT a star is! Tap a color to change the star.
Tap a color below to change the star!
🎮 Our Game: Still
This is a real game I made with friends at a game jam — we designed and created the whole thing in just three days! In Still, you explore rich, diverse worlds through your camera lens and decide the fate of a world.
▶ Play Still
🏆 Winner of the UW–Madison Respawn Game Jam 2023
☄️ Comet Crash!
When a space rock — a comet, asteroid, or meteoroid — smashes into a moon or planet, it blasts out a bowl-shaped hole called a crater. The bigger and faster the rock, the bigger the crater! The Moon is covered in craters because it has no air or weather to wear them away. Tap the surface to crash your own space rock and make a crater!
Rock size:
Tap the moon to crash a comet!
🚀 Meet NASA
NASA (the National Aeronautics and Space Administration) is America's space agency. NASA's scientists and engineers build rockets, send robots to explore other planets, launch giant telescopes, and study Earth, the Sun, and the whole universe! Here are fun things to explore on NASA's website just for kids, NASA Space Place:
NASA Space Place Games Crafts & Projects Hands-on Activities Videos Space Words
These buttons open NASA's official kids' website in a new tab.
👇 Tap a planet to explore it! They go in order from the Sun.
🌍 How Things Move
This shows how the Earth and Moon move in space. The Earth spins around like a top — that gives us day and night. The Moon travels around the Earth in a big circle called an orbit. Watch them move, then stand up and act it out with a friend!
☀️ The Sun (on the right) lights the Moon. Watch its light change as it orbits! Tap Earth or the Moon to speed up.
🔢 Put the Planets in Order
Drag each planet into the right spot — closest to the Sun goes first!
❓ Space Fun Quiz
🚀 Meet the Rocket
A rocket is a powerful vehicle that carries astronauts, satellites, and robots up into space. Earth's gravity pulls everything down, so a rocket burns fuel to blast hot gas out the bottom — that push (called thrust) shoots it upward, faster and faster, until it flies all the way into space! Tap each part to see what it does, then count down and blast off.
Tap a part!
This is a rocket, ready for space. Tap the nose, window, body, fins, or flames to learn about each part.
🔗 Match the Planet
Tap a planet on the left, then tap its clue on the right!

🧠 Planet Memory Match
Flip two cards to find matching planets. Find all the pairs!
